message:
feat(freeze): Convert type operators and rotation operations to Zig

Converted type operators (6 ops):
- pow: Power operator using frozen_pow
- typeof: Type check operator using frozen_typeof
- instanceof: Instance check with JS_IsInstanceOf
- in: Property existence check with frozen_in
- to_object: Convert value to object with JS_ToObject
- to_propkey: Convert value to property key via JSAtom

Converted rotation operations (4 ops):
- rot3l: Rotate top 3 stack values left [a,b,c] -> [b,c,a]
- rot3r: Rotate top 3 stack values right [a,b,c] -> [c,a,b]
- rot4l: Rotate top 4 stack values left
- rot5l: Rotate top 5 stack values left

All operations use Zig-safe patterns:
- stack[@intCast(sp - N)] for stack access
- Proper error checking with qjs.JS_EXCEPTION
- Return value checking with JS_IsException
- JSAtom handling with proper cleanup
